name: codex-ratelimit
description: A VSCode extension for monitoring Codex rate limits

codexRatelimit.enableLogging.description: Legacy logging toggle. If enabled and no explicit log level is selected, the effective minimum log level becomes Info.

enumDescriptions: Show informational messages, warnings, and errors.
Show all logs, including verbose debug messages.
codexRatelimit.logLevel.description: Minimum log level written to the Codex Rate Limit output channel.

codexRatelimit.showOutputOnError.description: Show the output panel automatically when an error is logged.

codexRatelimit.color.enable.description: Enable colored status bar text and progress bars based on usage percentage.

codexRatelimit.color.criticalColor.description: Color for critical state (usage at or above critical threshold). Applied to status bar text and progress bars.

codexRatelimit.color.criticalThreshold.description: Usage percentage threshold for critical state (applied to status bar text and progress bars).

codexRatelimit.color.warningColor.description: Color for warning state (usage at or above warning threshold but below critical threshold). Applied to status bar text and progress bars.

codexRatelimit.color.warningThreshold.description: Usage percentage threshold for warning state (applied to status bar text and progress bars).

codexRatelimit.sessionPath.description: Custom path to Codex CLI/extension sessions directory (leave empty for default ~/.codex/sessions).

codexRatelimit.refreshInterval.description: How often to refresh the stats (in seconds). Minimum 5 seconds, maximum 1 hour.

enumDescriptions: Hide the rate-limit source in the status bar.
Show a short source label such as Live, API, or LS.
Show a full source label such as Live Session, App Server, or Last Session.
codexRatelimit.statusBar.sourceIndicator.description: Optionally show the active rate-limit source in the status bar.

scripts.compile: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
